TermsEnum.name: Index name, exact match only (no wildcards)
TermsEnum.field: Index field name, exact match only (no wildcards)
TermsEnum.string: String prefix for matching terms. E.g. "ki" matches all terms starting with "ki"
TermsEnum.size: Number of terms to return, default 10
TermsEnum.index_filter: Filter documents from which to enumerate terms, same syntax as regular query DSL
